title: Mastercard Payment
description: A payment transaction processed through the Mastercard network, representing a transfer of funds between a payer and payee. Applicable across Mastercard Send, Account to Account Commerce, Bill Pay, and checkout solutions.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment, generated using UUID logic to unambiguously link request and response messages.

paymentType.description: Classification of the payment indicating its purpose and processing path.

amount.description: Payment amount without decimal separators. The number of implied decimal places depends on the currency. For example, 10350 in USD represents $103.50.

currency.description: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for the payment amount.

status.description: Current status of the payment in its lifecycle.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the payment initiation in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset.

sender.description: The party initiating or funding the payment.

recipient.description: The party receiving the payment funds.

cardNumber.description: Primary Account Number (PAN) of the card used for the payment. Must pass Luhn algorithm validation.

tokenNumber.description: Payment token representing the card number for tokenized transactions (MDES).

merchantId.description: Card acceptor or merchant unique identification number assigned by the acquirer.

merchantName.description: Name of the card acceptor or merchant.

merchantCategoryCode.description: Four-digit ISO 18245 Merchant Category Code (MCC) classifying the type of business.

acquirerId.description: Interbank Card Association (ICA) number of the acquiring institution.

icaNumber.description: ICA number of the issuer or acquirer initiating the request.

authorizationCode.description: Authorization code returned by the issuer for an approved transaction.

billingAmount.description: Amount appearing on the cardholder statement in the billing currency, without decimals.

billingCurrency.description: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for the billing amount.

conversionRate.description: Currency conversion rate applied when the transaction and billing currencies differ.

network.description: Payment network through which the transaction was processed.

channel.description: The channel through which the payment was initiated.

posEntryMode.description: Point of service entry mode indicating how the card data was captured at the terminal.

terminalId.description: Unique code identifying a terminal at the card acceptor location.

settlementDate.description: Date on which the transaction settles, in YYYYMMDD format.

referenceId.description: External reference identifier provided by the originator for reconciliation.

memo.description: Brief description or comment provided by the originator supporting the payment.

PaymentParty.description: A party involved in a payment transaction, either as sender or recipient.

name.description: Full name of the payment party.

accountNumber.description: Account number of the payment party.

institutionId.description: Identifier for the financial institution of the payment party.

line1.description: First line of the street address.

line2.description: Second line of the street address.
